description: Fix synchronization bugs and feature gaps between MealPlanPage, EventDetailPage, and PersonalMealDetailPage. After the previous PRD introduced inline ingredient editing and shared tabs, several props were left as no-ops, cache invalidation was incomplete, and General Items / pantry filtering were missing on Event and Meal detail pages.

userStories.title: Wire hasPendingChanges and onRecombine to GroceryListSection
userStories.description: Add hasPendingChanges={grocery.hasPendingChanges} and onRecombine={grocery.triggerRecombine} to GroceryListSection in EventDetailPage and PersonalMealDetailPage so the Reprocess button appears after ingredient edits.
acceptanceCriteria: hasPendingChanges and onRecombine props are passed to GroceryListSection in EventDetailPage (~line 959–976)
hasPendingChanges and onRecombine props are passed to GroceryListSection in PersonalMealDetailPage (~line 868–885)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Reference: MealPlanPage lines 523-524 already passes these props correctly. EventDetailPage GroceryListSection is at ~line 959; PersonalMealDetailPage GroceryListSection is at ~line 868. Both are missing hasPendingChanges and onRecombine.

userStories.title: Add cache invalidation to RecipeIngredientList edit/delete and pass cacheContext
userStories.description: RecipeIngredientList should call deleteGroceryCache in handleEditItemText and handleRemoveItem (not just handleAdd). EventRecipesTab accepts and passes a cacheContext prop to RecipeIngredientList. EventDetailPage and PersonalMealDetailPage pass cacheContext to EventRecipesTab.
acceptanceCriteria: handleEditItemText in RecipeIngredientList calls deleteGroceryCache(cacheContext...) when cacheContext is set
handleRemoveItem in RecipeIngredientList calls deleteGroceryCache(cacheContext...) when cacheContext is set
EventRecipesTabProps has cacheContext?: { type: 'event' | 'meal_plan'; id: string; userId: string }
EventRecipesTab passes cacheContext to RecipeIngredientList
EventDetailPage passes cacheContext={{ type: 'event', id: eventId, userId: user?.id ?? '' }} to EventRecipesTab
PersonalMealDetailPage passes cacheContext={{ type: 'event', id: eventId, userId: user?.id ?? '' }} to EventRecipesTab
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: RecipeIngredientList is at src/components/recipes/RecipeIngredientList.tsx. handleAdd already calls deleteGroceryCache when cacheContext is set (lines 127-129). handleEditItemText (~line 79) and handleRemoveItem (~line 95) need the same pattern. EventRecipesTab is at src/components/events/EventRecipesTab.tsx — it renders RecipeIngredientList at line ~282. Both detail pages pass userId to EventRecipesTab already; add cacheContext alongside.

userStories.title: Wire onIngredientsChange to grocery.refreshGroceries and remove forceMount
userStories.description: Replace onIngredientsChange={() => {}} no-ops with onIngredientsChange={() => grocery.refreshGroceries()} in both detail pages. Remove forceMount and data-[state=inactive]:hidden from the recipes TabsContent in RecipeDetailTabs so switching tabs remounts RecipeIngredientList with fresh data.
acceptanceCriteria: EventDetailPage passes onIngredientsChange={() => grocery.refreshGroceries()} to EventRecipesTab
PersonalMealDetailPage passes onIngredientsChange={() => grocery.refreshGroceries()} to EventRecipesTab
RecipeDetailTabs recipes TabsContent no longer has forceMount or data-[state=inactive]:hidden
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: RecipeDetailTabs is at src/components/shared/RecipeDetailTabs.tsx line 29 — the recipes TabsContent has forceMount className='data-[state=inactive]:hidden'. Both pages pass onIngredientsChange={() => {}} to EventRecipesTab — replace with grocery.refreshGroceries(). The test file RecipeDetailTabs.test.tsx tests forceMount behavior and will need updating to remove that assertion.

userStories.title: Consistent grocery refresh on recipe add/delete across all pages
userStories.description: PersonalMealDetailPage: add grocery.refreshGroceries() after loadEventData() in handleAddCustomMeal, handleAddRecipeMeal, handleAddManualMeal, and the parse-completion useEffect success path. EventDetailPage: add grocery.refreshGroceries() in handleKeepRecipeAnyway and handleRetryParse success flow.
acceptanceCriteria: handleAddCustomMeal in PersonalMealDetailPage calls grocery.refreshGroceries() after loadEventData()
handleAddRecipeMeal in PersonalMealDetailPage calls grocery.refreshGroceries() after loadEventData()
handleAddManualMeal in PersonalMealDetailPage calls grocery.refreshGroceries() after loadEventData()
The parse-completion useEffect success path in PersonalMealDetailPage calls grocery.refreshGroceries() after loadEventData()
handleKeepRecipeAnyway in EventDetailPage calls grocery.refreshGroceries() after loadEventData()
handleRetryParse success path in EventDetailPage calls grocery.refreshGroceries() after loadEventData()
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: PersonalMealDetailPage: handleAddCustomMeal ~line 440, handleAddRecipeMeal ~line 483, handleAddManualMeal ~line 539 — each has loadEventData() near the end; add grocery.refreshGroceries() after each. Parse-completion useEffect: the doParse() function calls loadEventData() at ~line 567. EventDetailPage: handleKeepRecipeAnyway ~line 539 calls loadEventData(); handleRetryParse success ~line 574 calls loadEventData(). Reference: EventDetailPage handleSubmitRecipe already calls grocery.refreshGroceries() after loadEventData() on line 476 — follow that pattern.

userStories.title: Fix AddIngredientInput error when userId is empty
userStories.description: parseIngredientText throws 'Not authenticated' when userId is an empty string. Add a guard in RecipeIngredientList.handleAdd to return early if userId is falsy.
acceptanceCriteria: handleAdd in RecipeIngredientList returns early if !userId
No unhandled error is thrown when AddIngredientInput is submitted with empty userId
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: RecipeIngredientList handleAdd is at ~line 111. parseIngredientText (src/lib/parseIngredientText.ts line 8) throws 'Not authenticated' when userId is falsy. EventRecipesTab passes userId ?? '' so an empty string reaches handleAdd when user is not loaded. Fix: add 'if (!userId) return;' at the top of handleAdd.

userStories.title: Add General Items support to EventDetailPage and PersonalMealDetailPage
userStories.description: Pass supportsGeneralItems: true to useGroceryList in both pages. Wire all General tab props to GroceryListSection: generalItems, onAddGeneralItemDirect, onBulkParseGroceryText, isAddingGeneral, onAddingGeneralChange.
acceptanceCriteria: useGroceryList in EventDetailPage is called with supportsGeneralItems: true
useGroceryList in PersonalMealDetailPage is called with supportsGeneralItems: true
GroceryListSection in EventDetailPage receives generalItems, onAddGeneralItemDirect, onBulkParseGroceryText, isAddingGeneral, onAddingGeneralChange
GroceryListSection in PersonalMealDetailPage receives generalItems, onAddGeneralItemDirect, onBulkParseGroceryText, isAddingGeneral, onAddingGeneralChange
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Reference: MealPlanPage lines 516-526 shows the full set of General props to pass. useGroceryList options interface already has supportsGeneralItems?: boolean (default false). EventDetailPage useGroceryList is at ~line 183; PersonalMealDetailPage at ~line 145. Both GroceryListSection render blocks are in the groceryContent prop of RecipeDetailTabs.

userStories.title: Add pantry filtering to RecipeIngredientList
userStories.description: RecipeIngredientList accepts an optional pantryItems prop and filters displayed ingredients using isPantryItem + DEFAULT_PANTRY_ITEMS (same logic as RecipeCard). EventRecipesTab accepts and passes pantryItems to RecipeIngredientList.
acceptanceCriteria: RecipeIngredientListProps has pantryItems?: string[]
RecipeIngredientList filters displayed ingredients: items where isPantryItem(name, allPantryItems, unit) are hidden
allPantryItems merges DEFAULT_PANTRY_ITEMS with the pantryItems prop (same as RecipeCard lines 64-69)
EventRecipesTabProps has pantryItems?: string[]
EventRecipesTab passes pantryItems to RecipeIngredientList
EventDetailPage passes pantryItems={grocery.pantryItems} to EventRecipesTab
PersonalMealDetailPage passes pantryItems={grocery.pantryItems} to EventRecipesTab
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: RecipeCard at src/components/recipes/RecipeCard.tsx lines 64-69 shows the allPantryItems merge and isPantryItem filter pattern — copy it exactly. isPantryItem is from '@/lib/groceryList'; DEFAULT_PANTRY_ITEMS is from '@/lib/pantry'. RecipeIngredientList renders grouped items at line ~150; apply filter before groupByCategory. The count shown on the toggle button in EventRecipesTab (~line 251) is just the label 'Ingredients' with no count — so no count update needed there.

userStories.title: Remove Rate Recipes button from PersonalMealDetailPage header card
userStories.description: Remove the ternary branch (~lines 825-839) rendering the Rate Recipes button in the header card of PersonalMealDetailPage. The Cooked/Undo status block should remain. Per-recipe rating via onRateRecipe in EventRecipesTab is unaffected.
acceptanceCriteria: The Rate Recipes Button and its wrapping div are removed from PersonalMealDetailPage
The isCooked block (Cooked badge + Undo button) is still present
The mealItems.length > 0 && totalRecipes > 0 ternary branch that previously showed Rate Recipes is removed
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: PersonalMealDetailPage ~lines 825-839: the else branch of the isCooked ternary renders a Rate Recipes button. Remove just that else branch (the div with Button). The isCooked true-branch (Cooked badge + Undo) at ~lines 809-824 must stay. The null fallback at line 840 stays.

userStories.title: Clean up dead props in GroceryListSection
userStories.description: Remove onRemoveGeneralItem and onUpdateGeneralItem from GroceryListSectionProps (defined but never used in the component body). Remove from MealPlanPage where they are passed.
acceptanceCriteria: GroceryListSectionProps no longer includes onRemoveGeneralItem
GroceryListSectionProps no longer includes onUpdateGeneralItem
GroceryListSection destructured props no longer include onRemoveGeneralItem or onUpdateGeneralItem
MealPlanPage no longer passes onRemoveGeneralItem or onUpdateGeneralItem to GroceryListSection
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: GroceryListSection is at src/components/recipes/GroceryListSection.tsx. Props interface lines ~44-45 define onRemoveGeneralItem and onUpdateGeneralItem. They are destructured in the component args but never referenced in the component body. MealPlanPage passes them at lines 518-519. Safe to delete both from interface, destructure, and call site.
